description:
Configure a multi-panel grid layout in Weasis to review the trauma CT scan series located in ~/DICOM/samples/trauma_ct/ under different tissue contrast settings. Display the same series in at least three panels with unlinked display properties. Apply distinctly different Window/Level settings to each panel to represent Soft Tissue, Bone, and Lung/Air views. Save a screenshot of the multi-window setup to ~/DICOM/exports/trauma_layout.png. Record the Window Center (WC) and Window Width (WW) values applied to each panel in ~/DICOM/exports/window_levels.txt using the following format:
Panel 1: WC [value], WW [value]
Panel 2: WC [value], WW [value]
Panel 3: WC [value], WW [value]
